## Extraction Rules
- DNA-MH elements to SEPARATE file (DNA-MH-WAVE-N.yaml) per wave
- NO direct merge into DNA.yaml until ALL waves complete
- Use Python script for final merge (not manual append)
- Waves of 2 agents MAX in parallel
- Save state between waves
